title: Mediterranean Pasta Bake
description: A flavorful and satisfying vegetarian pasta bake filled with the tastes of the Mediterranean.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the artichoke hearts, sun-dried tomatoes, and basil to the skillet. Cook for 2-3 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, Mediterranean cheese blend, and vegetable mixture. Mix well to combine.
Roll out the pastry sheet to fit a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Spoon the pasta mixture into the pastry-lined dish and top with additional cheese if desired.
Bake the pasta bake for 25-30 minutes until the pastry is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the pasta bake from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
